title: Optimised PvP
description: A lightweight, FPS‑optimized Fabric modpack for Minecraft 1.21.10, designed for Crystal PvP, duels, and competitive gameplay — featuring performance boosts, PvP HUDs, and clean textures for maximum clarity in combat.
body:
Optimised PvP is built for players who want the smoothest and fastest Minecraft experience on PvP servers such as Weltek or other allowed environments. It combines the best performance and PvP-focused mods to reduce lag, maximize FPS, and give you clear visibility and precise control during fights.

Features
• Performance boost with Sodium, Lithium, Entity Culling, and Dynamic FPS for stable high framerates
• PvP enhancements including PvP Swords, PvP Crosshair, PvP Utils, and PvP SMP Deluxe for better combat mechanics
• Clear visuals with Clear Water, Lava, and PowderSnow so you never lose sight of opponents
• Totem indicators with Totem Particles, Totem Vignette, and Totem Bar for intuitive survival feedback
• Quality of life tools like Item Scroller, MiniHUD, Ok Zoomer, and MaLiLib to streamline gameplay

Why choose this modpack
• Specifically optimized for PvP players
• Lightweight and stable, perfect for competitive server play
• Fast updates to new Minecraft versions (currently 1.21.10 Fabric)
• Focused only on what helps in combat, no unnecessary extras

Technical details
• Supported version: Minecraft 1.21.10 (Fabric)
• Includes Fabric API and YACL for compatibility
• Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer
